scripts.check: node --check app.js frontend/api.js frontend/connection_config.js frontend/connection_link.js frontend/connection_runtime.js frontend/crud_runtime.js frontend/discovery.js frontend/lifecycle.js frontend/mutation_runtime.js frontend/native_bridge.js frontend/offline.js frontend/onboarding.js frontend/onboarding_runtime.js frontend/qr_scanner.js frontend/realtime.js frontend/recent_connections.js frontend/selection_runtime.js frontend/session_runtime.js frontend/state.js frontend/sync_runtime.js frontend/todo_data.js frontend/todo_queries.js frontend/ui.js frontend/ui_connection.js frontend/ui_dialogs.js frontend/ui_dom.js frontend/ui_events.js frontend/ui_todos.js scripts/build_android.mjs scripts/build_web.mjs scripts/generate_keystore.mjs scripts/lib/copy_web_assets.mjs scripts/lib/java_runtime.mjs scripts/prepare_mobile.mjs scripts/serve_web.mjs
scripts.android:add: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync android
